ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "genome_position" TEXT /* Genomic position and change of the variant (e.g., g.32889805G>A) */,
  "effect_id" TEXT /* Clinical significance classification of the variant (e.g., P/LP, VUS) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene associated with the variant */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele at the variant position */,
  "alternate_allele" TEXT /* Alternate allele at the variant position */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Detailed clinical significance (e.g., pathogenic, benign, uncertain significance) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the variant data (e.g., specific sequencing project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant this evidence pertains to */,
  "PVS1" INTEGER /* PVS1 evidence flag */,
  "BA1" INTEGER /* BA1 evidence flag */,
  "BS1" INTEGER /* BS1 evidence flag */,
  "PM2" INTEGER /* PM2 evidence flag */,
  "PP3" INTEGER /* PP3 evidence flag */,
  "BP4" INTEGER /* BP4 evidence flag */,
  "BP7" INTEGER /* BP7 evidence flag */,
  "PP2" INTEGER /* PP2 evidence flag */,
  "BP1" INTEGER /* BP1 evidence flag */,
  "PM1" INTEGER /* PM1 evidence flag */,
  "PP5" INTEGER /* PP5 evidence flag */,
  "BP6" INTEGER /* BP6 evidence flag */,
  "PM4" INTEGER /* PM4 evidence flag */,
  "BP3" INTEGER /* BP3 evidence flag */,
  "PS4" INTEGER /* PS4 evidence flag */,
  "PS1" INTEGER /* PS1 evidence flag */,
  "PM5" INTEGER /* PM5 evidence flag */,
  "evidence_source" TEXT /* Source of the evidence (e.g., literature, database) */,
  "evidence_date" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was added */,
  "evidence_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geneticist, lab technician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update made to the variant */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_updates_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
